race.description: Moree Services Club/Narrabri Rsl Club Showcase Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: CAPSITY (3) fast filly resuming. Made rapid progress with the two wins last prep and expected to go on with it this time in. Fitted with the two trials and will take catching from the low gate. EEZITOSORT (8) improved quickly this campaign with a solid on-pace win from the wide draw over this track and trip. Can keep the winning momentum going in this stronger race. MASTER GEE (4) just over a month between runs when he shouldered the big weight to run fourth over 1000m at this track. Tackling a deeper field this time and is worth serious consideration. SNATCHREILLY (2) gelding who resumes on his home track with a decent record here. Fitted with a searching 1000m trial placing here and will benefit with the 4kg claimer aboard. Each-way.
